meaning: adj.骨学的,骨学上的adj.[解]骨(骼) 学的
examples: Phylogeny of the cyprinid subgenus Cyprinus (Mesocyprinus ) is elucidated based on both external and osteological features.
Methods:200 fractured in-patients in the osteological department were given differentiated nursing implementations and functional training instructions.
Noteworthy are several osteological features, including dental and ischial ones, which are transitional between the condition of Sinornithosaurus and that of Microraptor.
